'''tamuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalenotomy|scalenotomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalenotomy|scalenotomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tamuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmiwith|tæmiwith]] || [[word:tæmiwij|tæmiwij]] || [[word:tæmiwish|tæmiwish]] || [[word:tæmiwi|tæmiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamumuwuth|tamumuwuth]] || [[word:tamumuwuj|tamumuwuj]] || [[word:tamumuwush|tamumuwush]] || [[word:tamumuwu|tamumuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamuwuth|tamuwuth]] || [[word:tamuwuj|tamuwuj]] || [[word:tamuwush|tamuwush]] || [[word:tamuwu|tamuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamufwuth|tamufwuth]] || [[word:tamufwuj|tamufwuj]] || [[word:tamufwush|tamufwush]] || [[word:tamufwuf|tamufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamuwuthu|tamuwuthu]] || [[word:tamuwuju|tamuwuju]] || [[word:tamuwushu|tamuwushu]] || [[word:tamuwuku|tamuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamuwuth|tamuwuth]] || [[word:tamuwuj|tamuwuj]] || [[word:tamuwush|tamuwush]] || [[word:tamuwu|tamuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamuwuthul|tamuwuthul]] || [[word:tamuwujul|tamuwujul]] || [[word:tamuwushul|tamuwushul]] || [[word:tamuwukul|tamuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamuwuthuthu|tamuwuthuthu]] || [[word:tamuwujuju|tamuwujuju]] || [[word:tamuwushushu|tamuwushushu]] || [[word:tamuwuku|tamuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamuwuthun|tamuwuthun]] || [[word:tamuwujun|tamuwujun]] || [[word:tamuwushun|tamuwushun]] || [[word:tamuwukun|tamuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamuwuthuoro|tamuwuthuoro]] || [[word:tamuwujuoro|tamuwujuoro]] || [[word:tamuwushuoro|tamuwushuoro]] || [[word:tamuwukuoro|tamuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
